text: Any documentary preparation charge by an authorized agent of the department shall not exceed twenty dollars ($20).
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3.5. REGISTRATION AND TRANSFER OF VESSELS [9840 - 9928]
### Chapter 2. Registration [9850 - 9880]
##### § 9858.1

Any documentary preparation charge by an authorized agent of the department shall not exceed twenty dollars ($20).

*(Added by Stats. 1984, Ch. 1407, Sec. 2.)*

subsections.text: Any documentary preparation charge by an authorized agent of the department shall not exceed twenty dollars ($20).
